sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n51525" key="i)xnoba/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἰχνο-βάτης</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n51525.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">going on the track</tr_>, name of a hound, Ov.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Met.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.207</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
